name: Pumpkin Ring
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 12-cup bundt cake pan or angel food cake pan, 10 x 4 inches.
3. Beat all ingredients together on low speed for 30 seconds, scraping the bowl constantly.
4. Beat on medium speed for 3 minutes, scraping the bowl occasionally.
5. Pour batter into the prepared pan and bake for about 50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Allow to cool for 10 minutes before removing from the pan. Cool completely.
7. Beat glaze ingredients together.
8. Drizzle over the cooled cake.
